blocks.text: Built an LLM + rules hybrid system that audits dental explanation of benefits (EOBs), flags billing discrepancies, and cuts review time from 15 minutes to under one minute per claim.
Manual EOB review was slow, error-prone, and didn't scale for billing teams reviewing high claim volumes. Discrepancies were easy to miss under time pressure.
Combined structured rule checks for known billing patterns with LLM extraction over unstructured EOB fields
Designed evaluation sets and human review flows for high-confidence vs. ambiguous flags
Built reasoning layer to surface 1–3 actionable discrepancies per claim
Review time reduced from 15 minutes to under 1 minute per claim
1–3 discrepancies detected per reviewed EOB on average
